package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/hex"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for hex_decode_string_in_loop: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `hex.DecodeString(...)` inside loops.
type CaseHexDecodeStringInLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHexDecodeStringInLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHexDecodeStringInLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHexDecodeStringInLoopModel
}

type CaseHexDecodeStringInLoopService struct {
    repo *CaseHexDecodeStringInLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHexDecodeStringInLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeHexDecodeStringInLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHexDecodeStringInLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "hex_decode_string_in_loop"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    dst := make([]byte, hex.EncodedLen(len(buf)))
    hex.Encode(dst, buf)
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    hex_decode_string_loop_negative := map[string]int{"hex": 1, "decode": 2, "string": 3, "loop": 4}
    hex_decode_string_loop_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    hex_negative_0 := hex_decode_string_loop_negative["hex"] + len(input)
    _ = hex_negative_0
    decode_negative_1 := fmt.Sprintf("decode:%s", input)
    _ = decode_negative_1
    string_negative_2 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_negative_2
    for loop_negative_3Index, item := range items { hex_decode_string_loop_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_3Index }
    return nil
}
